summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of React financial intelligence dashboard. All core features working correctly with static mock data. Navigation, animations, data display, and chat functionality all functional.
passed_tests: Sidebar navigation works - all 4 pages load correctly
Sidebar hover expansion animation (64px to 200px) working perfectly
Market Overview page loads with all 5 market indices (NIFTY, SENSEX, BANK NIFTY, USD/INR, VIX)
Top Movers table displays stocks including IRFC prominently
FII/DII flow section shows FII Net and DII Net values correctly
Commodities section shows all 4 items: Gold, Crude Oil, Bitcoin, Silver
Research Session page loads with RELIANCE analysis
Scenario badges (Bull/Base/Bear) display correctly
Signals & Alerts page navigation works
Filter tabs functionality working (found all 7 tabs: All, High Priority, Petroleum, Banking, FMCG, IT, Pharma)
Active Alerts cards are displayed (3 cards found)
Macro Dashboard shows 4 key indicators (GDP, CPI, Repo, Fed Funds)
Global Events feed displays 5 items
Macro-Micro transmission table is visible
Chat panel displays messages correctly
Chat input allows typing and accepts input
Chat panel collapse/expand functionality working
Chat send functionality working (both click and Enter key)
Mocked AI responses working correctly
IST clock in top bar updates correctly
DB status indicator visible with green connection status
Dark theme implementation working correctly
Framer Motion animations working smoothly
All data from mockData.js displaying correctly
